title: Delivering code in production with debug features activated is security sensitive
description: Activating debug features in production code can expose sensitive information and create security vulnerabilities.
message: Debug features should be disabled in production code.
recommendation: Disable debug features in production code.

noncompliant.description: Activating debug logging in production code.

compliant.description: Setting log level to warning in production code.

why_is_this_an_issue: Debug features can reveal sensitive information, such as error messages, and expose potential security vulnerabilities.
how_to_fix: Disable debug features in production code or configure them to produce minimal output.

checks.message: Debug features activated in production code via logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG).

logic.check_type_doc: Uses a custom function to robustly detect logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG) calls.
